No dependents ++ ++ / DBD::SQLite::Amalgamation Contents NAME SYNOPSIS DESCRIPTION SEE ALSO AUTHORS COPYRIGHT NAME DBD::SQLite::Amalgamation - Single C-file based DBD::SQLite distribution SYNOPSIS use DBI; my $dbh = DBI-&gt;connect(&quot;dbi:SQLite:dbname=dbfile&quot;,&quot;&quot;,&quot;&quot;); DESCRIPTION This module is nothing but a stub for an experimental way to distribute Matt Sergeant&#39;s DBD::SQLite, using the concatenated C files (the amalgamation ) as provided by the SQLite Consortium. As of version 3.5.8, the FTS3 full-text search engine is now built by default. SEE ALSO DBD::SQLite , where this module is derived from. AUTHORS Audrey Tang &lt;cpan@audreyt.org&gt; COPYRIGHT The author disclaims copyright to this source code. In place of a legal notice, here is a blessing: May you do good and not evil. May you find forgiveness for yourself and forgive others. May you share freely, never taking more than you give. &times; Module Install Instructions To install DBD::SQLite::Amalgamation, copy and paste the appropriate command in to your terminal. cpanm cpanm DBD::SQLite::Amalgamation CPAN shell perl -MCPAN -e shell install DBD::SQLite::Amalgamation For more information on module installation, please visit the detailed CPAN module installation guide .
